_method: Grow composite star rating (TEST — Glenvale only). Each pillar scored 0-5 vs target by linear interpolation between anchors floor=0 / target=3 / stretch=5 stars (clamped). Anchors — Sales YoY: floor -8/target +8/stretch +20. CUSTOMER = 50/50 of Google-health (floor 1.66/target 3.32/stretch 5.0) and F1 race score (floor 320/target 190/stretch 130, lower better). PEOPLE = 50/50 of RMS-health (1.66/3.32/5.0) and RTW% (0/80/100). OPERATIONS = equal-thirds of brand audit /5 (4.0/4.5/5.0), remote audit /100 (50/85/100), and COMPLIANCE. COMPLIANCE = 50/50 of coaching-checklist % of standard and open/close completion %, normalised 50/85/100. Composite = average of the four pillars. All QTD (Q2 2026). Glenvale: Customer = Google 4.07->3.89 + F1 270->1.15 = 2.52; Operations = audit 4.67->3.68 + remote 89.4->3.59 + compliance 90.3%->3.71 = 3.66; People = RMS 4.14->3.98 + RTW 45%->1.69 = 2.83; Sales 5.0. F1 race now lives in CUSTOMER (was Operations).

ops.openclose_detail: 57 open & 56 close vs 56 trading days (20 Apr–14 Jun), Process Street feed
ops.rtw_detail: 5 of 11 sickness absences with an RTW logged (QTD)
